description: A one-way ticket for a single journey between an origin and destination station. Valid on the selected travel date only.

metro.validity: Travel date only. Ticket expires at midnight on the travel date.

national_rail.formula: amount = base_fare_usd + (stops_travelled × per_stop_rate_usd), rates vary by fare_class and service_type
national_rail.validity: Selected travel date and scheduled service only. Not valid on a different service without a change fee.
national_rail.change_deadline: At least 24 hours before scheduled departure

description: A two-leg ticket covering an outbound journey and a return journey on the same route. Each leg is priced and treated independently.

national_rail.formula: total amount = outbound_fare + return_fare (each leg calculated separately using stops-based pricing for the booked fare class)
national_rail.outbound_validity: Selected outbound travel date and scheduled service.
national_rail.return_validity: Any scheduled service on the same route within 30 days of the outbound travel date.
national_rail.change_deadline: At least 24 hours before the leg being changed
national_rail.refund_rule: RF001 (normal service), RF002 (express service). Each leg is assessed separately.
national_rail.notes: If the outbound leg has already been travelled, only the return leg is eligible for cancellation and refund.

description: Unlimited travel on all metro lines (M1, M2, M3, M4) for one full calendar day. Not valid on national rail services.

metro.validity: Calendar day of purchase from 00:00 to 23:59. Cannot be used on a different date.
metro.notes: A day pass offers better value than individual single tickets for passengers making 3 or more metro trips in a day. Tap in and out normally at each station.
